name: ger40_asia_london_breakout_m5
hypothesis: GER40 M5 exhibits directional continuation when London session (07:00-10:00 UTC) breaks the Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) range by >= 0.5 ATR with a strong body candle. Expectation: PF >= 1.5 with >= 200 trades over 4.5y. Falsified if breakout-only variant produces PF < 1.2.

regime_filter.description: Only trade when Asia range is neither dead (too tight) nor already exploded (too wide). Excludes ~40% of days.

signals.entry_long: price closes >= asia_high + 0.5*ATR(14,M5) AND candle_body >= 1.0*ATR(14,M5), within first 9 bars of 07:00-10:00 UTC window
signals.session_mask: entries only 07:00-10:00 UTC; no new entries after 10:00

exits.sl: opposite side of asia range or 1.5*ATR(14) whichever closer

notes: Explicit broker-TZ handling required: convert session windows to broker server time. Log detected asia_high/low per day to confirm session mask is not empty.
